meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Scaling: Antigravity Template for Faster Dev
content.seo_description: Stop wasting hours on boilerplate. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to slash development time and ship high-quality client apps faster.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity template eliminates friction by providing a pre-configured, production-ready stack. By combining this scaffold with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate generation and repetitive logic. This workflow allows you to focus purely on high-value business logic, effectively doubling your output speed while maintaining enterprise-grade architectural standards for your clients.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your sprint, your client is waiting for the demo, and you are still fighting with folder structures and dependency hell. Every hour spent configuring a new repo is an hour lost on billable features. You are a builder, not a configuration engineer, yet the weight of 'getting started' is crushing your profit margins.

Enter the Antigravity project template. This is the industrial-grade foundation designed to bypass the manual setup phase entirely. By pairing this framework with the iterative intelligence of Claude Code, you transform from a manual coder into an architectural orchestrator, shipping complex features in a fraction of the time.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root architecture. This ensures your project starts with standardized linting, CI/CD pipelines, and environment management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the standard Antigravity web template with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Initialize Antigravity project with TS and Supabase'

steps.title: Automated Schema Definition
steps.description: Don't write migrations by hand. Use the AI to infer your database schema from your business requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a SaaS task management app including users, projects, and tasks tables with appropriate foreign keys.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file schema.sql --prompt 'Generate SQL migrations for this schema'

steps.title: Component Library Injection
steps.description: Rapidly build the UI by injecting pre-tested Antigravity components directly into the view layer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive dashboard layout using Antigravity UI components, including a sidebar, header, and data table.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate Dashboard.tsx using Antigravity UI'

steps.title: API Route Construction
steps.description: Abstract away the boilerplate of API handling by letting Claude Code implement the handler logic based on your schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create CRUD API routes for tasks using the established Supabase client and Antigravity middleware.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement CRUD API routes for tasks'

steps.title: Production-Ready Validation
steps.description: Run a final audit on your code to ensure type safety and adherence to performance best practices before deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current codebase for potential performance bottlenecks and ensure all types are strictly defined.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Run security and performance audit on codebase'

pro_tips: Always define your 'Data Context' in a single markdown file so Claude Code maintains consistency across all generated files.
Use Antigravity's built-in mock server during development to decouple your frontend work from backend database latency.
Leverage the 'Claude Code' history feature to quickly revert to previous architectural states if a feature iteration goes sideways.
Keep your prompt library in a local Notion database so you can copy-paste standardized Antigravity commands for future clients.
Enable 'Strict Mode' in your Antigravity config to force Claude Code to write cleaner, more maintainable TypeScript code.
content.next_steps: Once your first prototype is functional, deploy to Vercel via the Antigravity CLI and start gathering user feedback to iterate on your MVP.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting slow setups eat your freelance profits. Master the Antigravity workflow today and reclaim your development time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
